title: Innicia Adventure
description: This is a modpack intended for my personal server - Innicia.
body:
# Innicia Adventure
This modpack is intended for players of my server - Innicia. (Available for 1.20.1+)

Innicia Adventure is an adventure - survival pack.

## Season 4: Echoes of Legends
More time has since passed on the plane of Innicia, stories of the Innician crew has now become myths and legends.
- To survive the early game, utilise your chosen RPG class to the maximum, before you are able to craft or loot powerful endgame equipment!
- While equipment is important for your adventure, do stock up on food, cooked dilligently from a handful of crops! You might want to take a careful dive into alchemy as well.
- Mobs seems to be more lively.
- Introduces multiple new yet vanilla-esque biomes, such as Autumnal Woods, Windswept Forests, Cypress Swamps, etc.
- On the road, it is easy to get lost. Use Xaero's map and nature's compass to figure your destination!
- Gives player an option to equip backpack for more inventory spaces and survival skills!
- Also includes some quality-of-life mods such as Sodium and Lithium, designed for players to have a smooth gameplay experience.

## Season 3: Industrial Revolution
The gears keep turning and doesn't slow down!
- Design complicated machineries for automation!
- To the stars!
- Wait, sounds like something that is dead yet undead is disrupting the world. Is this the same Ender Dragon?
- I am so confused right now.

## Season 2: Fimbulvetr
Embrace the long and mighty winter that is Fimbulvetr!
- Embrace a challenging climate, where all crops grow slower, or not at all!
- Much weaker gears and stronger mobs!
- Better Nether and Better End! (heh)
- Also, where does all these cobblemons come from?

## Season 1: Reinitialization
The journey of old players comes to a restart after few generations of rebirth!
- Venture into a world with your origin pick, based on your own backstory!
  ![Giant player](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/J3fahFy4/images/df8697f10b27d8802bd1790ddaca72bffc9fd3ca.png)
- Explore a world that seems familiar yet it is not, and thread carefully in a region of unknown.
  ![Random End Dungeon](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/J3fahFy4/images/da2a42fc4a227cdf7cdeab93de4f17da52024468.jpeg)
- Power yourself with a variety of weapons to choose from, especially from the new ores not found in vanilla Minecraft.
- Fight enemies that doesn't seem to be from this world!

## Licensing
Please be informed that the following files are from CurseForge (before v3.0.0):
- [MC Dungeons Artifacts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mcdar) with explicit permission from chronos_sacaria of Timefall Development Team.

*For MCDX mods, kindly refer to the license document included in the modpack.

## Performance
Even though this modpack includes some quality-of-life mods, some of the mods are quite resource-heavy, hence it is recommended to have at least **4 GB** of RAM allocated.
